page_metadata.biotools__summary: A framework for all-atom Monte Carlo simulations of proteins. It incorporates several advanced probabilistic models of protein structure for conformational sampling, efficient move-algorithms and the OPLS and PROFASI forcefields.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A framework for all-atom Monte Carlo simulations of proteins. It incorporates several advanced probabilistic models of protein structure for conformational sampling, efficient move-algorithms and the OPLS and PROFASI forcefields.
